title: roella ciliata var. dregeana
intro: Roella ciliata var. dregeana, also known as the South African roella, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In traditional medicine, Roella ciliata var. dregeana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, while in modern herbalism, it is sometimes used in capsule or tincture form.
